summary: Iteration 8 - New Features Testing: Signal Strategies, Multi-TF Signals, Trade Journal, Admin Panel, Pricing Page. Backend: 15/15 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. All new endpoints and UI components verified.

issues: 'Made with Emergent' badge still visible in bottom-right corner - CSS hiding not working (badge is injected by platform at runtime)

backend: GET /api/signals/strategies returns 10 strategies (auto, ema_crossover, rsi_divergence, smc, vwap, macd, bollinger, ichimoku, fibonacci, price_action)
POST /api/signals/generate with multi-TF params returns enhanced signal with timeframes_analyzed, holding_duration, confluence_score, take_profit_3, strategy_used, higher_tf_bias, invalidation
POST /api/journal creates a trade journal entry with P&L calculation
GET /api/journal/stats returns win_rate, total_pnl, emotion_breakdown, total_trades, wins, losses
GET /api/admin/stats returns platform stats (total_users, total_signals, total_trades, active_alerts, system_health)
GET /api/admin/users returns user list without passwords
GET /api/admin/system returns data feed status (OANDA active, Kraken active, yfinance active)
Non-admin user gets 403 on all admin endpoints
Market live data returns crypto, forex, indian
frontend: Login with test@test.com / test123 works
Signals page loads with data-testid='signals-page'
Signals page shows timeframe toggles (1m, 5m, 15m, 1H, 4H, 1D, 1W)
Signals page shows strategy selector with 10 strategies
Signals page shows 'Generate Multi-TF Signal' button
Signals page shows signal cards with TFs, Hold duration, Confluence dots, TP3, Trade Logic, Signal Trigger
Journal page loads with data-testid='journal-page'
Journal page shows 'Log Trade' button
Journal page shows trade form with emotion tags (Calm, Confident, Fear, Greed, FOMO, Revenge)
Journal page shows star ratings for quality
Journal page shows stats cards (Total Trades, Win Rate, Total P&L, W/L)
Pricing page loads with data-testid='pricing-page'
Pricing page shows 3 plans (Basic INR 999, Pro INR 2,499, Beast Mode INR 4,999)
Pricing page shows phone numbers +91 8102126223 and +91 8867678750
Pricing page shows WhatsApp contact link
Admin page shows 'Access Denied' for non-admin user (test@test.com)
Admin page loads for admin user (contact.developersingh@gmail.com)
Admin page shows tabs: Overview, Users, Signals, System
Admin page System tab shows Data Feeds (OANDA active, Kraken active, Yfinance active)
Admin page System tab shows Market Status (Crypto 24/7, Forex Open, Indian Closed)

action_items: The 'Made with Emergent' badge is still visible - this appears to be injected by the platform at runtime and may not be controllable via CSS. Consider contacting Emergent support if removal is required.
seed_data_creation: Added password to existing admin user (contact.developersingh@gmail.com) for JWT login testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features from iteration 8 are working: 10 signal strategies, multi-TF signal generation with enhanced fields (timeframes_analyzed, holding_duration, confluence_score, TP3, higher_tf_bias, invalidation), Trade Journal CRUD with emotions/ratings/P&L, Admin Panel with stats/users/signals/system tabs, Pricing page with 3 plans and contact info. Admin user can login with contact.developersingh@gmail.com / admin123. The Emergent badge hiding CSS was updated but the badge is still visible (platform-injected).
